flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 9 pp at Dine College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (5.5% vs 14.7%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Dine College rose 424% between 2021 and 2024 (9.1% → 47.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Dine College rose 114% between 2021 and 2024 (5.9% → 12.6%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Dine College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 1.4k).
